shell.publicFooter: Public landing — personal data stays in the Entra ID–protected workspace.
shell.workspaceFooter: Authenticated workspace — personal data stays private.

home.title: MicroStarPlatform
home.subtitle: Collect daily micro-achievements — DMTA to STAR

charter.title: Project charter
charter.subtitle: Purpose and how work is meant to move here

journal.title: Write an achievement
journal.subtitle: Note situation, task, action, and result (STAR)

match.title: Match text
match.subtitle: Find journal notes related to pasted reference text

inbox.title: Import from Outlook
inbox.subtitle: Pick a meeting or mail, then send it to Match or Journal

pipeline.title: Progress board

summary.title: Summary & metrics

landing.architectureHint: Live Azure stack topology (mock fallback when API is offline)
landing.privacyBody: Public landing shows architecture only. Personal data lives in an Entra ID–protected workspace.

glossary.intro: Neutral labels used on the public site and in the private workspace. STAR is a framework; the web app is the first step to persist and reuse structured records.

dashboard.intro: Simple loop: write an achievement → import from Outlook → match text → set next actions on the progress board. Follow the numbered menu on the left.
dashboard.contextMatchHint: Match reference text against your achievement journal.

journal.bodyHint: Optional. If empty, STAR fields are concatenated for storage.
journal.empty: No entries yet. Capture a milestone with optional STAR fields.

match.referenceHint: Paste opportunity context or notes to match against your journal.

inbox.intro: Pull a calendar event or mail message into Match reference text or a Journal draft. Nothing is saved until you confirm on those pages.
inbox.mockMode: Mock mode — sample Outlook items (set VITE_ENTRA_CLIENT_ID for live Graph).
inbox.liveMode: Live Microsoft Graph — consent may appear on first load.
inbox.consentHint: User-initiated only. Delegated scopes: User.Read, Calendars.Read, Mail.Read.

charter.purposeBody: Help business initiatives move forward—including consultation and deliberation along the way—and leave judgments and outcomes as records you can refer to later.
charter.capabilitiesLead: Work progresses through these kinds of steps.

launch.title: Start an initiative
launch.body: Clarify the case or theme you are advancing and create a clear starting point.

plan.title: Plan the approach
plan.body: Organize goals and how you will proceed so stakeholders share the same frame.

consult.title: Consult
consult.body: Pressure-test options and gather material for decisions.

single.title: Run a focused review
single.body: Get a coherent view or proposal for a single question.

multi.title: Advance compound work
multi.body: Move several threads in parallel so the whole initiative progresses.

commit.title: Commit to the record
commit.body: Capture conclusions, context, and results as searchable knowledge.

charter.outcomeBody: Not scattered notes, but a collection of outcome records with situation, challenge, action, and result—ready to search, compare, and use for the next decision.
